subject: [PATCH v3 03/10] fuse: refactor io-uring header copying from ring

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch refactors the logic for copying headers from a ring in the fuse kernel module. It extracts this logic into a new function called copy_header_from_ring(), which makes it clearer and more centralized, and also handles errors and rate-limited logging. This change is part of a larger series of patches to improve the io-uring functionality in the fuse module.
